title: Exciting soccer at Infantry School
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Infantry School FC from...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Infantry School FC from Oudtshoorn took on Paris United and Simunye FC from Lawaaikamp on Saturday 31 January on the Infantry School's home field.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Infantry School FC from Oudtshoorn took on Paris United and Simunye FC from Lawaaikamp on Saturday 31 January on the Infantry School's home field."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In the first match, played at 10:00, Infantry School FC won 2 - 0 against Paris United."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second match at 14:00 against Simunye FC had supporters on the edge of their seats.","html":"The second match at 14:00 against Simunye FC had supporters on the edge of their seats."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Simunye FC beat Infantry School FC with a close 2 - 1.","html":"Simunye FC beat Infantry School FC with a close 2 - 1."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photo gallery: Exciting soccer at Infantry School","html":"Photo gallery: Exciting soccer at Infantry School"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
